_about: Maintained list of capability areas that already have a wiki/handbook page written. The wiki-gap detector (.github/scripts/wiki-gap-detector.mjs, `npm run docs:wiki-gap`) compares this list against the distinct capability areas in capability-map.manifest.json and opens a 'Wiki page needed: <area>' GitHub issue for any area that is NOT listed here. This is a maintainer-updated file, not generated: when you write the wiki page for an area, add that area's exact name to `documented` so the detector stops filing (and never re-files) an issue for it. Starting empty because the wiki has no pages yet — every area is an open gap until its page is written.
